notes: Local env and preview/prod env audit started
DB schema and RLS verification audit started
Auth0 session and RLS session-var audit started
DB UUID is read from namespaced custom claim; native Auth0 org_ id is rejected
No session redirects before tenant-scoped DB query
Auth0 SDK route is mounted through Next proxy.ts; middleware deprecation warning removed

Current app uses a single (authenticated) route group with nested admin paths instead of story text app/(treasurer) and app/(admin). This is accepted for now because Auth0/session proxy, route generation, and nav map already target the current structure.
packages/design-system/tokens.json remains canonical; packages/ui exports a typed token projection from src/tokens.ts instead of introducing a duplicate tokens.v1.json.
packages/ui/src/tokens.test.ts compares exported uiTokens.color against packages/design-system/tokens.json
rtk pnpm --filter @mi-banquito/ui test and type-check passed
